panels.description: Latest daily active user count from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT daily_active_user_count as "Daily Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Daily Active Users

panels.description: Latest weekly active user count from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT weekly_active_user_count as "Weekly Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Weekly Active Users

panels.description: Latest monthly active user count from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT monthly_active_user_count as "Monthly Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Monthly Active Users

panels.description: Latest assigned seat count from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT assigned_seat_count as "Assigned Seats"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Assigned Seats

panels.description: Latest pending invite count from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pending_invite_count as "Pending Invites"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY `date` DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.title: Pending Invites

panels.description: Distinct Claude Code users with code activity on the most recent available analytics date

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as "Active Claude Code Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  AND `date` = (
    SELECT MAX(`date`)
    FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
    WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  )
  AND (
    cc_session_count > 0
    OR cc_commit_count > 0
    OR cc_pull_request_count > 0
    OR cc_lines_added > 0
    OR cc_lines_removed > 0
    OR edit_tool_accepted + edit_tool_rejected + multi_edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_rejected + write_tool_accepted + write_tool_rejected + notebook_edit_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_rejected > 0
  )

panels.title: Active Claude Code Users

panels.description: Total Claude Code sessions in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(cc_session_count) as "Sessions"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Sessions

panels.description: Accepted tool actions as a percentage of all accepted and rejected tool actions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  SUM(edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_accepted + write_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_accepted) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(
        SUM(
          edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_accepted + write_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_accepted
          + edit_tool_rejected + multi_edit_tool_rejected + write_tool_rejected + notebook_edit_tool_rejected
        ),
        0
      ),
  1
) as "Acceptance Rate %"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Tool Acceptance Rate

panels.description: Total lines added by Claude Code across the organization in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(cc_lines_added) as "Lines Added"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Lines Added

panels.description: Total commits attributed to Claude Code in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(cc_commit_count) as "Commits"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: Commits by Claude Code

panels.description: Total pull requests attributed to Claude Code in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(cc_pull_request_count) as "PRs"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'

panels.title: PRs by Claude Code

panels.description: How many days have elapsed since the newest row across the migrated Claude analytics tables; Anthropic analytics normally lag by about 3 days

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(latest_date), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as "Days Since Latest Data"
FROM (
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_chat_project
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_skill_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(`date`) as latest_date
  FROM _tool_claude_code_connector_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
) latest_dates

panels.title: Data Freshness

panels.description: Daily, weekly, and monthly active user counts over time from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as time,
  daily_active_user_count as "Daily Active Users",
  weekly_active_user_count as "Weekly Active Users",
  monthly_active_user_count as "Monthly Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Org Active Users Over Time

panels.description: Daily Claude Code sessions and distinct users with code activity over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as time,
  SUM(cc_session_count) as "Sessions",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
    WHEN (
      cc_session_count > 0
      OR cc_commit_count > 0
      OR cc_pull_request_count > 0
      OR cc_lines_added > 0
      OR cc_lines_removed > 0
      OR edit_tool_accepted + edit_tool_rejected + multi_edit_tool_accepted + multi_edit_tool_rejected + write_tool_accepted + write_tool_rejected + notebook_edit_tool_accepted + notebook_edit_tool_rejected > 0
    ) THEN user_id
    ELSE NULL
  END) as "Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
GROUP BY `date`
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Sessions and Active Claude Code Users Over Time

panels.description: Lines added and removed over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as time,
  SUM(cc_lines_added) as "Lines Added",
  SUM(cc_lines_removed) as "Lines Removed"
FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
GROUP BY `date`
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Code Churn Over Time

panels.description: Assigned seats and pending invites over time from the organization summary feed

targets.rawSql:
SELECT `date` as time,
  assigned_seat_count as "Assigned Seats",
  pending_invite_count as "Pending Invites"
FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Seats and Pending Invites Over Time

panels.description: Accepted and rejected tool actions, grouped by Claude Code tool

targets.rawSql:
SELECT tool_name as "Tool",
  SUM(accepted) as "Accepted",
  SUM(rejected) as "Rejected",
  ROUND(SUM(accepted) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(accepted + rejected), 0), 1) as "Acceptance Rate %"
FROM (
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'edit_tool' as tool_name, edit_tool_accepted as accepted, edit_tool_rejected as rejected
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  UNION ALL
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'multi_edit_tool' as tool_name, multi_edit_tool_accepted as accepted, multi_edit_tool_rejected as rejected
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  UNION ALL
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'write_tool' as tool_name, write_tool_accepted as accepted, write_tool_rejected as rejected
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  UNION ALL
  SELECT `date`, connection_id, scope_id, 'notebook_edit_tool' as tool_name, notebook_edit_tool_accepted as accepted, notebook_edit_tool_rejected as rejected
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
) tool_actions
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY SUM(accepted + rejected) DESC, tool_name

panels.title: Tool Acceptance by Tool

panels.description: Peak daily users and session counts grouped by Claude skill usage

targets.rawSql:
SELECT skill_name as "Skill",
  MAX(distinct_user_count) as "Peak Daily Users",
  SUM(chat_conversation_count) as "Chat Conversations",
  SUM(cc_session_count) as "Claude Code Sessions"
FROM _tool_claude_code_skill_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
GROUP BY skill_name
ORDER BY SUM(cc_session_count + chat_conversation_count) DESC, skill_name

panels.title: Skill Usage by Skill

panels.description: Peak daily users and session counts grouped by connector usage

targets.rawSql:
SELECT connector_name as "Connector",
  MAX(distinct_user_count) as "Peak Daily Users",
  SUM(chat_conversation_count) as "Chat Conversations",
  SUM(cc_session_count) as "Claude Code Sessions"
FROM _tool_claude_code_connector_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
GROUP BY connector_name
ORDER BY SUM(cc_session_count + chat_conversation_count) DESC, connector_name

panels.title: Connector Usage by Connector

panels.description: Project-level chat adoption with only project aggregates; user identifiers are intentionally excluded from this org dashboard

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(project_name, ''), project_id) as "Project",
  MAX(distinct_user_count) as "Peak Daily Users",
  SUM(conversation_count) as "Conversations",
  SUM(message_count) as "Messages"
FROM _tool_claude_code_chat_project
WHERE $__timeFilter(`date`)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(project_name, ''), project_id)
ORDER BY SUM(message_count + conversation_count) DESC, 1
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Chat Project Usage

panels.description: Diagnostics table for row counts and freshest available date per Claude metric table

targets.rawSql:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_activity_summary' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_activity_summary
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_user_activity' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_user_activity
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_skill_usage' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_skill_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_connector_usage' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_connector_usage
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '_tool_claude_code_chat_project' as table_name,
    COUNT(*) as row_count,
    MAX(`date`) as latest_date,
    COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, MAX(`date`), UTC_DATE()), 9999) as days_lag
  FROM _tool_claude_code_chat_project
  WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} AND scope_id = '${scope_id}'
) data_volume
ORDER BY row_count DESC, table_name

panels.title: Data Volume by Table

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_claude_code_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC
list.label: Connection ID
list.name: connection_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_claude_code_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT id as scope_id FROM _tool_claude_code_scopes WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY 1
list.label: Scope ID
list.name: scope_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT id as scope_id FROM _tool_claude_code_scopes WHERE connection_id = ${connection_id} ORDER BY 1
